LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. DBA LIME'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IF STILL DEEMED NECESSARY, NEUTRON MAY FILE A NEW PETITION AFTER PLAINTIFF FILES A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THAT COMPLAINT SHALL BE FILED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED UPON PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATION. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gay Grunfeld, Esq. 415-433-6830 of Rosen Bien Galvan & Grunfeld for Plaintiff.
Joshua Lipshutz, Esq. 202-955-8500 of Gibson Dunn for Defendant NEUTRON HOLDINGS.

RULING - A R G U E D.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC. dba Lime's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Neutron Holdings, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. If still deemed necessary, Neutron may file a new petition after plaintiff files a second amended complaint. That complaint shall be filed within 10 days of this order. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed upon Plaintiff's representation. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
